name: Arjun Patel
title: Senior Product Manager
summary: Fintech PM with deep domain expertise across payments, lending, and compliance. Led the launch of a card issuing platform that processed $1B in transactions in year one. Pushes features from discovery to GA with minimal hand-holding.

highlights: Led card issuing platform from zero to $1B in processed transactions in 12 months
Drove KYC/KYB compliance overhaul that unblocked enterprise deals worth $4M ARR
Managed roadmap across 3 squads and presented quarterly plans to the board
Launched consumer lending product in 6 states, growing to 40k borrowers in 18 months
Owned A/B test program that improved application completion rate from 38% to 61%
Supported launch of Stripe Issuing in 3 new markets
Built internal tooling for compliance operations teams
